name: AVENUE THERAPEUTICS, INC.
summary: Avenue Therapeutics, Inc. is a specialty pharmaceutical company focused on developing drug product candidates. Its primary pipeline includes IV tramadol, an intravenous formulation of the analgesic tramadol, and ATX-04. The company has no approved products for commercial sale. It previously held rights to AJ201 (licensed from AnnJi Pharmaceutical) and BAER101 (via Baergic Bio), both of which have been divested. Avenue is a majority-controlled subsidiary of Fortress Biotech, Inc.

products.name: IV Tramadol
products.description: Intravenous formulation of tramadol, a Schedule IV controlled substance analgesic, currently in clinical development.

products.name: ATX-04
products.description: Drug product candidate in development; specific therapeutic indication not detailed in this section.

partnerships.description: Parent company controlling majority voting power; entitled to receive significant annual share grants from Avenue.
Former licensor of AJ201; license agreement has since been terminated.
